tasks.subject: Task 1: Phase 1 Scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restructure docs/, create 5 guide skeletons, migrate 4 dev files, delete stale alchemy doc, trim README to landing-page shell.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/crawl-loop.md, docs/combat.md, docs/exploration.md, docs/crafting-loot.md, docs/session-tracking.md
- Move: docs/crawl-system.md → docs/dev/crawl-system.md
- Move: docs/combat-tools.md → docs/dev/combat-tools.md
- Move: docs/exploration-tools.md → docs/dev/exploration-tools.md
- Move: docs/utilities.md → docs/dev/utilities.md
- Modify: docs/dev/utilities.md (remove alchemistCookbook row)
- Delete: docs/alchemist-cookbook.md
- Modify: README.md (landing page shell)

**Verify:** Glob docs/dev/*.md → 4; Glob docs/*.md → 6; Grep alchemistCookbook in docs/dev/ → 0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/crawl-loop.md", "docs/combat.md", "docs/exploration.md", "docs/crafting-loot.md", "docs/session-tracking.md", "docs/dev/crawl-system.md", "docs/dev/combat-tools.md", "docs/dev/exploration-tools.md", "docs/dev/utilities.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docs/dev/ contains 4 moved reference files", "docs/alchemist-cookbook.md deleted", "docs/dev/utilities.md has no alchemistCookbook reference", "5 new guide skeletons exist at docs/ top level with full header structure and gif placeholders", "README trimmed to ~80-120 line landing shell"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Crawl Strip headliner (composite)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fill Crawl Strip headliner covering Strip UI, Movement Tracker (with Rollback folded in), Combat Dropdown, HP+stats. 700-900 words.

**Files:** Modify docs/crawl-loop.md

**Verify:** wc -w on section in 700-900 range; Grep TODO|TBD → 0; all 4 subsections present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/crawl-loop.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Feature-section template followed", "700-900 words", "Movement subsection covers crawl+combat budgets, terrain, Rush, effective mode speed", "Rollback folded into Movement subsection", "Combat Dropdown covers tab layout, mana cost calc, spell dialog", "HP+Stats quick reference covers hero+NPC card details", "Settings table includes hideNpcNames, autoRemoveDefeated, npcActionMenu, enforceCrawlMovement, enforceCombatMovement, enforceNpcMovement"]}
```
